name: @clearline/data-access-developer
description: Developer settings data-access layer for clearline-web (EPIC-CW-022 / US-CW-041): React Query hooks over /api/developer for scoped API-key create/revoke (reveal-once) and webhook create/delete/resend (reveal-once signing secret). No UI, no business rules.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-022 (US-CW-041 Developer Settings — API Keys & Webhooks).
